page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.large is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the arm64-based Alibaba Yitian YiTian710 processor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs running at 2.75 GHz, with 2 physical cores and 1 thread per core. The instance is configured with 8.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It operates on the KVM hypervisor and does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate average single-core capabilities but weaker multi-core and memory throughput. The single-core stress-ng CPU performance and single-threaded gzip compression fall into the average tier. However, multi-core stress-ng performance, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, and overall PassMark CPU scores are weak to poor. Memory bandwidth tests show weak performance, with read-only large block speeds at 38.93 GB/sec and write speeds at 15.18 GB/sec. Cryptographic operations are supported via hardware AES, though PassMark encryption benchmarks score in the poor tier.

From a resource density perspective, the Arm-based architecture offers a qualitatively cost-efficient profile for workloads that do not require x86-specific instruction sets or high-performance multi-threading. Tradeoffs include the absence of local storage and lower performance in memory-intensive and parallelized computing tasks. The instance is best suited for lightweight general-purpose workloads, basic web serving, single-threaded applications, and small-scale database operations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.large is a general-purpose instance powered by a 2.75 GHz Arm-based Alibaba Yitian YiTian710 processor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and a 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, with no local storage or GPU accelerators. Running on the KVM hypervisor, the instance delivers average single-core CPU performance and single-threaded compression speeds. However, multi-core processing, memory bandwidth, and cryptographic operations fall into the weak to poor benchmark categories. The custom Yitian architecture provides a qualitatively cost-efficient option for workloads that do not demand high parallel processing power or x86 compatibility. This instance is suitable for lightweight general-purpose applications, basic web serving, and single-threaded tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.large is an arm64 general-purpose instance with 2 dedicated vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, and a 2.75 GHz Yitian710 processor, offering a cost-efficient profile for lightweight workloads.

tagline: An Arm-based general-purpose instance featuring dedicated vCPUs and balanced memory configuration for lightweight, single-threaded workloads.

Equipped with 2 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of system memory
Features 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth and KVM virtualization
Delivers average single-core performance but exhibits weak multi-core and memory bandwidth
Suitable for lightweight general-purpose applications, basic web serving, and single-threaded tasks
